zh.lifeSummary: 當Alix de Tancarville de Serans於大約1233年出生在法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利坦卡維爾時，她的父親Raoul III de Tancarville - Chamberlain de Normandie44歲，母親Helyssende de Meulan39歲。她於大約1251年與Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1279年享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alix de Tancarville de Serans于大约1233年出生在法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利坦卡維爾时，她的父亲Raoul III de Tancarville - Chamberlain de Normandie44岁，母亲Helyssende de Meulan39岁。她于大约1251年与Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1279年享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Serans
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: variant of   Kearns  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Kearns
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Céirín ‘descendant of Céirín’, a personal name from a diminutive of ciar ‘dark, black’, with the addition of English excrescent -s.
in Ulster, possibly a variant of   Cairns  .

nameMeanings.name: Alix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

en.lifeSummary: When Alix de Tancarville de Serans was born about 1233, in Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Raoul III de Tancarville - Chamberlain de Normandie, was 44 and her mother, Helyssende de Meulan, was 39. She married Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec about 1251. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1279, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alix de Tancarville de Serans est née environ 1233, à Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Raoul III de Tancarville - Chamberlain de Normandie, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Helyssende de Meulan, avait 39 ans. Elle a épousé Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec environ 1251. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1279, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alix de Tancarville de Serans um 1233 in Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul III de Tancarville - Chamberlain de Normandie 44 und ihre Mutter Helyssende de Meulan 39. Sie hat um 1251 Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1279 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Tancarville de Serans è nata il circa 1233 nel Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Raoul III de Tancarville - Chamberlain de Normandie, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Helyssende de Meulan, aveva 39 anni. Lei sposato Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec circa 1251. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1279, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.Bricquebec, Manche, Normandie, France: フランスノーマンディマンチェブリククエベック

ja.lifeSummary: Alix de Tancarville de Seransが約1233年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメタンカーヴィルで生まれた時，父Raoul III de Tancarville - Chamberlain de Normandieは44歳，母Helyssende de Meulanは39歳であった。約1251年にRobert VI Bertrand de Bricquebecと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1279年に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alix de Tancarville de Serans(이)가 대략 1233년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 세이인-마이팀 탠카빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul III de Tancarville - Chamberlain de Normandie(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helyssende de Meulan(은)는 39세였다. 그녀는 대략 1251년 Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1279년 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alix de Tancarville de Serans nasceu aproximadamente 1233, em Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Raoul III de Tancarville - Chamberlain de Normandie, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Helyssende de Meulan, tinha 39 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec aproximadamente 1251. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1279, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alix de Tancarville de Serans родилась около 1233 г. в местности танкарвилл, сине-маритим, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul III de Tancarville - Chamberlain de Normandie было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Helyssende de Meulan, 39. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec около 1251 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1279 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alix de Tancarville de Serans nació aproximadamente 1233, en Tancarville, Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Raoul III de Tancarville - Chamberlain de Normandie, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Helyssende de Meulan, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Robert VI Bertrand de Bricquebec aproximadamente 1251. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1279, a la edad de 47 años.
